title: MCBMods
description: Utility Addon for Minecraft Breakdown Server
body:
*Note: This is not intended for custom modpacks but as an addon for a single modpack called Minecraft Breakdown*

Minecraft Breakdown offers one of the best experiences for Flans mod. However, it does not have any addons that to enhance the user experience on there. This mod hopes to make life easier with gadgets such as notifications and afk.

This mod uses Essential Mod

Current Features:
1. /afk (turns on afk which auto replies with a configurable message)
2. /mcbmods (activates a GUI that allows a lot of configurations with the mod)
3. /fc [a, f, p, r] (switches between ally, faction, public, and reply chat)
4. /invworth <smart> (shows worth of inventory or smart inventory)
5. /loadout (quickly setup/buy loadouts)
6. "l" keybind to toggle off waypoints

Credits:
- Inforno: Creator of the addon
- blooditor: Creator of Minecraft Breakdown + creator of the current icon this mod uses
